creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #2)

My original src.conf had a bad "optimization" where I had been thinking that since I had a working compiler that was not being updated with new source code that I could avoid the time to rebuild it during the bootstrap:

WITHOUT_GCC_BOOTSTRAP=

But this makes the default include/library paths wrong for buildworld and the like and so requires them to be enforced on the command line. The build environment is not set up to automatically do that in such cases.

So I had wondered out of bounds.
